title: Rising Empire Pack
description: The Rising Empire Pack is a client-side modpack created for the Hungarian Rising Empire Minecraft server, optimizing gameplay and improving loading times for Survival and Horizon modes.
body:
# Rising Empire Pack
The **Rising Empire Pack** is an unofficial, client-side modpack created for the popular Hungarian **Rising Empire** Minecraft server. Its purpose is to enhance the player experience through performance optimization, visual improvements, and quality-of-life features, all while maintaining compatibility with the server's plugin-based architecture.

# ✨ Features:
## Performance Optimization:

>- Utilizes mods like **Sodium** and **Lithium** to improve FPS, reduce memory usage, and optimize the game's performance for smoother gameplay on all devices.
>- Faster loading times ensure you can start playing with minimal delay.

## User Interface Enhancements:

>- **Xaero's World Map** provides a detailed, full-screen map for easier navigation.
>- **Shulker Box Tooltip** shows the contents of shulker boxes in a tooltip, simplifying inventory management.
>- **Better Advancements** and **Better Statistics Screen** improve menus for more detailed progress tracking.

## Quality-of-Life Improvements:

>- Visual upgrades include **Fresh Animations** and **Not Enough Animations** for mobs and players, enhancing immersion.
>- **Continuity** adds connected textures, while tools like **Dynamic FPS** and **ImmediatelyFast** ensure smooth gameplay, even on low-end systems.

## Vanilla Tweaks Customizations:

This pack incorporates select customizations from **[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)** to enhance visuals while preserving the vanilla aesthetic:
>- **No Pumpkin Overlay**: Improves visibility by removing the pumpkin's obstructive overlay.
>- **Lower Shield**: Adjusts the shield’s position to free up screen space.
>- **Lower Fire**: Reduces fire height for better visibility during combat.

## Plugin Compatibility:

>- Designed to fully complement the Rising Empire server's plugin-based gameplay without introducing conflicts or altering server mechanics.

## Lightweight Design:
>- Minimal system impact ensures compatibility with lower-spec PCs, while still offering a rich gameplay experience.

The **Rising Empire** server offers unique game modes like **Survival** and **Horizon**, alongside a vibrant community of players. With this modpack, you can enjoy smoother performance, improved visuals, and an optimized interface while exploring one of Hungary’s most exciting Minecraft servers.
